---
title: ""
page-layout: full
engine: markdown
listing:
  contents: "."
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  date-format: "D MMMM YYYY"
  filter-ui: false
  sort-ui: false
---

::: page-header
# Writing
:::

<p style="margin:0 0 1.5rem 0;font-size:1rem;line-height:1.75;color:var(--text-muted);">Commentary on research, policy, and practice.</p>

<hr style="border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);margin:0 0 1.5rem 0;">

```{=html}
<style>
/* Match project-card aesthetic */
.quarto-listing .card {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border) !important;
  border-radius: var(--radius) !important;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
  transition: box-shadow 0.25s, transform 0.22s, border-color 0.22s;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.quarto-listing .card::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  height: 3px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--navy), var(--accent));
  transform: scaleX(0);
  transform-origin: left;
  transition: transform 0.28s ease;
}
.quarto-listing .card:hover {
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  border-color: transparent !important;
}
.quarto-listing .card:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }

.quarto-listing .listing-title {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1rem !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  color: var(--navy) !important;
  line-height: 1.4;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.quarto-listing .listing-title a {
  color: var(--navy) !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
}
.quarto-listing .listing-title a:hover { color: var(--accent) !important; }

.quarto-listing .listing-description {
  font-size: 0.88rem !important;
  color: var(--text-muted) !important;
  line-height: 1.65;
}
.quarto-listing .listing-date {
  font-size: 0.75rem !important;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--accent) !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}
.quarto-listing .listing-categories .listing-category {
  font-size: 0.68rem !important;
  font-weight: 600 !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  background: var(--tag-bg) !important;
  color: var(--tag-color) !important;
  border: 1px solid var(--border) !important;
  border-radius: 999px !important;
  padding: 0.15rem 0.55rem !important;
  cursor: default;
}
</style>
```
